channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Al Green responds to July 4 question by renewing call to impeach Trump
item.description: Democratic lawmakers express pride in American democracy and freedoms while raising concerns about the administration ahead of the 250th Independence Day.

item.title: Immigrant business owner who achieved the American Dream says birth tourism is a 'slap in the face'
item.description: Kris Ramsingh, a Trinidad-born Virginia business owner, calls birthright citizenship a 'slap in the face' to legal immigrants who worked hard.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: McConaughey's Call for Unity Reflects America's Enduring Spirit
Michele Tafoya tells Newsmax 'politics of envy' affects WNBA and Caitlin Clark
item.description: Michele Tafoya, the Republican candidate for Minnesota's open U.S. Senate seat and a longtime NFL sideline reporter, spoke with Newsmax's Rob Schmitt Tonight.
